parameters.query:
WITH imported_games AS (
  SELECT unnest(string_to_array($1, '|')) AS game_id
)
SELECT gi.game_id, gi.title, gi.os,
  COALESCE(gi.initial_release, gi.temp_release) AS initial_release,
  gi.app_link, gi.created_date,
  CASE WHEN dev.developer_name IS NULL THEN dev.dev_company ELSE dev.developer_name END AS publisher_name,
  gi.metadata -> 'categories' AS categories
FROM game_info gi
LEFT JOIN developer dev ON gi.publisher_id = dev.id
LEFT JOIN imported_games ig ON gi.game_id = ig.game_id
WHERE COALESCE(gi.initial_release, gi.temp_release) BETWEEN ($2::date - INTERVAL '30 days') AND $2::date
  AND (gi.type IS NULL OR gi.type::TEXT ILIKE '%sync%')
  AND gi.app_link IS NOT NULL AND gi.is_active = True
  AND ig.game_id IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(gi.metadata -> 'categories') AS cat WHERE lower(cat) = ANY(string_to_array(lower($3), '|')));

WITH imported_games AS (
  SELECT unnest(string_to_array($1, '|')) AS game_id
)
SELECT gi.game_id, gi.title, gi.os,
  COALESCE(gi.initial_release, gi.temp_release) AS initial_release,
  gi.app_link, gi.created_date,

  gi.metadata -> 'categories' AS categories
FROM game_info gi
LEFT JOIN developer dev ON gi.publisher_id = dev.id
LEFT JOIN imported_games ig ON gi.game_id = ig.game_id
WHERE COALESCE(gi.initial_release, gi.temp_release) BETWEEN ($2::date - INTERVAL '30 days') AND $2::date
  AND (gi.type IS NULL OR gi.type::TEXT ILIKE '%sync%')
  AND gi.app_link IS NOT NULL AND gi.is_active = True
  AND ig.game_id IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(gi.metadata -> 'categories') AS cat WHERE lower(cat) = ANY(string_to_array(lower($3), '|')));

WITH imported_games AS (
  SELECT unnest(string_to_array($1, '|')) AS game_id
)
SELECT gi.game_id, gi.title, gi.os,
  COALESCE(gi.initial_release, gi.temp_release) AS initial_release,
  gi.app_link, gi.created_date,
  CASE WHEN dev.developer_name IS NULL THEN dev.dev_company ELSE dev.developer_name END AS publisher_name,
  gi.metadata -> 'categories' AS categories
FROM game_info gi
LEFT JOIN developer dev ON gi.publisher_id = dev.id
LEFT JOIN imported_games ig ON gi.game_id = ig.game_id
WHERE COALESCE(gi.initial_release, gi.temp_release) BETWEEN ($2::date - INTERVAL '30 days') AND $2::date
  AND (gi.type IS NULL OR gi.type::TEXT ILIKE '%sync%')
  AND gi.app_link IS NOT NULL AND gi.is_active = True
  AND ig.game_id IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(gi.metadata -> 'categories') AS cat WHERE lower(cat) = ANY(string_to_array(lower($3), '|')));

parameters.jsCode:
const buildData = $('Build Rows - Puzzle').first().json;
return buildData.game_ids.map(id => ({ json: { ID: id } }));

const buildData = $('Build Rows - Arcade').first().json;
return buildData.game_ids.map(id => ({ json: { ID: id } }));

const buildData = $('Build Rows - Simulation').first().json;
return buildData.game_ids.map(id => ({ json: { ID: id } }));

const count = $('Build Rows - Puzzle').first().json.count;
return [{ json: { category: 'puzzle', count } }];

const count = $('Build Rows - Arcade').first().json.count;
return [{ json: { category: 'arcade', count } }];

const count = $('Build Rows - Simulation').first().json.count;
return [{ json: { category: 'simulation', count } }];
return [{ json: { category: 'puzzle', count: 0 } }];
return [{ json: { category: 'arcade', count: 0 } }];
return [{ json: { category: 'simulation', count: 0 } }];
return [{ json: { category: 'puzzle', count: 0, error: true, error_message: 'Smartsheet Full' } }];
return [{ json: { category: 'arcade', count: 0, error: true, error_message: 'Smartsheet Full' } }];
return [{ json: { category: 'simulation', count: 0, error: true, error_message: 'Smartsheet Full' } }];
